title: Fish Market
creator: Joachim Beuckelaer
description: Oil painting of a fish market in the Netherlands. The painting showcases several types of fish, both whole and butchered.
subject: fish;food market;oil painting;Netherlandish art;secular art

title: Still Life with Cake
creator: Raphaelle Peale
description: Oil painting with a plate of cake, grapes, and white wine
subject: cake;still life;food painting;American art;grapes;wine
source: The American Wing, The Met Collection

title: Still Life with Oysters, a Silver Tazza, and Glassware
creator: Willem Claesz Heda
description: Oil painting of glassware, silver plates, oysters, a lemon, and beer.
subject: still life;oysters;grapes;beer;Dutch art;

title: Still Life of Grapes and Peaches
creator: Panfilo Nuvolone
description: Oil painting of grapes and peaches on a silver fruit tray with bees flying around the fruit
subject: still life;grapes;peaches;fruit paintings;Italian art;bees

title: A Kitchen
creator: Hendrick Sorgh
description: Oil painting of two maids cleaning fish and peeling vegetables. They are surrounded by kitchenware, a cat, and an open birdcage. In the background between the two maids are a couple embracing.
subject: domestic life;domestic art;fish;cats;Dutch art;secular art;vegetables;food preparation

title: The Feast of Acheloüs
creator: Peter Paul Rubens; Jan Brueghel the Elder
description: Oil painting of Greek mythology scene featuring Acheloüs the river god and Theseus speaking over a table full of food surrounded by other figures. The table features chicken, oysters, shellfish, and various serving and drinking vessels.
subject: Greek mythology;feast;Thesus;Acheloüs;Netherlandish art;

title: The Baker's Cart
creator: Jean Michelin
description: Oil painting of French peasants selling breads from a wooden cart. The painting depicts two adult men, one adult woman, and four children. Everyone is wearing tattered clothes and all but one of the subjects is looking straight out from the painting.
subject: French art;French peasants;secular art;bread;family;

title: New York Daily News
creator: William Michael Harnett
description: Small scale oil painting depicting a copy of the New York Daily News dated April 3, 1888, a beer mug, a smoking pipe, two biscuits, and various tiny crumbs on the table.
subject: Miniature art;American art;newspaper;beer;tobacco;
source: The American Wing, The Met Collection

title: The Family of John Q. Aymar
creator: George W. Twibil Jr. (Attributed)
description: Oil portrait of a family featuring a mother, father, and two young daughters. They are arranged around a table holding a platter of various fruits, a pitcher, books, and fabric.
subject: Family portrait;American art;fruit;American life;
source: The American Wing, The Met Collection

title: The Last Supper
creator: Ugolino da Siena (Ugolino di Nerio)
description: Tempera painting of the Last Supper depicting Jesus Christ and his apostles around a table filled with cutlery, tableware, and dishes of meat.
subject: Christian art;Italian art;supper;meat;Jesus Christ;apostles;
source: The Robert Lehman Collection, The Met Collection

title: The Temptation
creator: Pietro Longhi (Pietro Falca)
description: Oil painting of a wealthy man sitting at a table with bread, two tea cups, and a dish with some sort of white food on it, perhaps butter. He is flanked by two men and two women are approaching the table. The first woman approaching the table is a sex worker, per the Met.
subject: Secular art;erotic imagery;bread;Italian art;

title: Still Life with Ham
creator: Philippe Rousseau
description: Oil painting of a table holding a folded newspaper, a large ham, wine, plates, and cutlery.
subject: Ham;still life;secular art;French art;newspaper;

title: The Brioche
creator: Edouard Manet
description: Oil painting of a wooden table covered in a white napkin under a large loaf of brioche. The table also has grapes, peaches, plums, a red box, and a white flower.
subject: Still life;French art;secular art;brioche;fruit;

title: Young Husband: First Marketing
creator: Lilly Martin Spencer
description: Oil painting of a frowning man carrying a basket of groceries that are spilling onto the street. Another man is behind him looking amused. Rain is falling, but the man carrying the groceries has no umbrella.
subject: American art;comedic art;produce;fruits;vegetables;grocery shopping;marriage;
source: The American Wing, The Met Collection

title: The Afternoon Meal (La Merienda)
creator: Luis Meléndez
description: Oil painting of a picnic basket surrounded by two loaves of bread, grapes, peaches, pears, a melon, and dishware. The background depicts an outdoor setting.
subject: Spanish art;still life;secular art;picnic;countryside;bread;fruit;
